basic_details.job_title: IIT Hyderabad Fire Safety Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Hyderabad (IIT Hyderabad) Fire Safety Officer Notification 2026 has been released on 07-05-2026 on the official website iith.ac.in. Has been announced through the IIT Hyderabad Fire Safety Officer Recruitment 2026. Candidates up to 45 years of age who have BE (Fire Engineering), B.Tech (Safety & Fire Engineering), B.Tech (Fire Technology & Safety Engineering), or Divisional Officer Course from National Fire Service College, Nagpur are eligible to apply for these Fire Safety Officer vacancies. The online application process for IIT Hyderabad Fire Safety Officer Re

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years. Age relaxation will be applicable as per the rules.

qualification.details: Fire Safety Officer: Essential Education Qualifications & Experience: Criteria-I: BE (Fire Engineering) / B.Tech(Safety & Fire Engineering)/B. Tech (Fire Technology & Safety Engineering) from a University / Institution recognized by Govt of India with minimum 2 years of experience in fire safety in high-rise buildings. OR Criteria-II: Divisional Officer Course from National Fire Service College, Nagpur, with minimum 5 years of experience in fire safety in high-rise buildings.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Hyderabad Fire Safety Officer Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 28-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Hyderabad to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Hyderabad Fire Safety Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the IIT Hyderabad Fire Safety Officer recruitment is 28 May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Fire Safety Officer position?
faq.answer: Candidates need a BE (Fire Engineering) or equivalent degree, or a Divisional Officer Course from the National Fire Service College, Nagpur, with relevant experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for the Fire Safety Officer post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Fire Safety Officer post is 45 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Fire Safety Officer role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. ₹70,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the IIT Hyderabad Fire Safety Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official website of IIT Hyderabad before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for this position is Contractual.

faq.question: Q8. Where is IIT Hyderabad located?
faq.answer: IIT Hyderabad is located in Kandi, Telangana.

faq.question: Q9. When does the online application process start?
faq.answer: The online application process starts on 7 May 2026.
